claim: ZERO.4 Q2.3 seed 2 completed under its frozen local functional replay guard: quantity reached the declared threshold, the guard rejected no attempts, cumulative public replay regression reached 2.685%, and the diagnostic was a no-go without promotion or replication-seed access.
